selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel transport-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the transport-contract parent into controller-facing fences for explicit atemporal transport scope, guarded inverse/composition/normalization handling, anti-sameness and anti-preservation handling, non-gating invariants plus local irreducible transport handling, and anti-geometry / anti-semantic-completion closure.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the transport packet is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the transport-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_STAYS_EXPLICIT_SCOPED_ATEMPORAL_AND_NON_IDENTITY_BEARING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's top-level transport fence without allowing motion or identity inflation.

candidate_items.name: INVERSE_COMPOSITION_TRIVIALIZATION_AND_NORMALIZATION_CLAIMS_STAY_GUARDED_AND_NONCANONICAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's anti-canonicality handling around inverse, composition, and trivialization claims.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_CANNOT_AUTOMATICALLY_PRESERVE_STRUCTURE_OR_IMPLY_SAMENESS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-sameness and anti-preservation posture into a usable controller fence.

candidate_items.name: INVARIANTS_REMAIN_EXPLICIT_NONGATING_AND_TRANSPORT_STAYS_LOCAL_AND_IRREDUCIBLE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's invariant discipline and local irreducible transport handling into one controller-facing fence.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_IS_NOT_GEOMETRY_PROBABILITY_OPTIMIZATION_CURVATURE_OR_SEMANTIC_COMPLETION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-geometry and anti-semantic-completion close into a usable controller fence.

quarantined_items.name: TRANSPORT_LANGUAGE_AS_MOTION_IDENTITY_OR_CANONICAL_CONNECTION_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows transport vocabulary while denying motion, sameness, and canonical connection escalation, so that overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: TRANSPORT_LANGUAGE_AS_INVARIANT_GOVERNANCE_GEOMETRY_OR_MEANING_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it keeps transport language available while blocking invariance-gating, geometry, and semantic-authority drift.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-ninth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
